# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cicd security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Distribute Application

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - release/*
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_configuration:
        description: 'Build configuration (Release/Debug)'
        required: true
        default: 'Release'
        type: choice
        options:
          - Release
          - Debug
      target_platform:
        description: 'Target platform'
        required: true
        default: 'linux-x64'
        type: choice
        options:
          - linux-x64
          - win-x64
          - osx-x64

permissions:
  contents: read
  actions: read

env:
  BUILD_CONFIG: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && inputs.build_configuration || 'Release' }}
  TARGET_PLATFORM: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && inputs.target_platform || 'linux-x64' }}
  ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS: 30

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Application
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30
    outputs:
      build_version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
      build_sha: ${{ steps.version.outputs.sha }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Determine build version
        id: version
        run: |
          SHORT_SHA=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)
          BUILD_DATE=$(date +%Y%m%d)
          VERSION="1.0.0-${BUILD_DATE}-${SHORT_SHA}"
          echo "version=${VERSION}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "sha=${SHORT_SHA}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Build version: ${VERSION}"

      - name: Set up build environment
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci --ignore-scripts
        working-directory: ./

      - name: Run security audit
        run: npm audit --audit-level=high || true

      - name: Lint code
        run: npm run lint --if-present

      - name: Run unit tests
        run: npm test --if-present

      - name: Build application
        run: |
          npm run build -- --configuration=${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }}
        env:
          NODE_ENV: production
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}

      - name: Prepare compiled binaries
        run: |
          mkdir -p staging/bin
          if [ -d "dist" ]; then
            cp -r dist/* staging/bin/
          elif [ -d "build" ]; then
            cp -r build/* staging/bin/
          fi
          echo "Compiled binaries prepared"
          ls -la staging/bin/

      - name: Prepare configuration files
        run: |
          mkdir -p staging/config
          if [ -d "config" ]; then
            for f in config/*.example config/*.template config/*.defaults; do
              [ -e "$f" ] && cp "$f" staging/config/
            done
          fi
          cat > staging/config/build-info.json << EOF
          {
            "version": "${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}",
            "commit": "${{ steps.version.outputs.sha }}",
            "branch": "${GITHUB_REF_NAME}",
            "buildDate": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)",
            "configuration": "${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }}",
            "platform": "${{ env.TARGET_PLATFORM }}",
            "runner": "github-actions"
          }
          EOF
          echo "Configuration files prepared"
          ls -la staging/config/

      - name: Prepare deployment scripts
        run: |
          mkdir -p staging/deploy
          if [ -d "scripts/deploy" ]; then
            cp scripts/deploy/*.sh staging/deploy/ 2>/dev/null || true
            cp scripts/deploy/*.py staging/deploy/ 2>/dev/null || true
          fi
          cat > staging/deploy/install.sh << 'DEPLOY_SCRIPT'
          #!/usr/bin/env bash
          set -euo pipefail

          SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
          APP_DIR="${INSTALL_DIR:-/opt/myapp}"
          CONFIG_DIR="${APP_DIR}/config"
          BIN_DIR="${APP_DIR}/bin"

          echo "=== Application Installer ==="
          echo "Installing to: ${APP_DIR}"

          if [ "$(id -u)" -ne 0 ]; then
            echo "Warning: Running without root privileges. Some operations may fail."
          fi

          mkdir -p "${BIN_DIR}" "${CONFIG_DIR}"

          cp -r "${SCRIPT_DIR}/../bin/"* "${BIN_DIR}/"
          cp -r "${SCRIPT_DIR}/../config/"* "${CONFIG_DIR}/"

          if [ -d "${BIN_DIR}" ]; then
            find "${BIN_DIR}" -type f -name "*.sh" -exec chmod 755 {} \;
          fi

          echo "Installation complete."
          echo "Application installed to: ${APP_DIR}"
          DEPLOY_SCRIPT
          chmod 755 staging/deploy/install.sh

          cat > staging/deploy/healthcheck.sh << 'HEALTH_SCRIPT'
          #!/usr/bin/env bash
          set -euo pipefail

          APP_DIR="${INSTALL_DIR:-/opt/myapp}"
          HEALTH_ENDPOINT="${HEALTH_URL:-http://localhost:3000/health}"

          echo "Running health check..."

          if [ ! -d "${APP_DIR}/bin" ]; then
            echo "FAIL: Application directory not found"
            exit 1
          fi

          if command -v curl &> /dev/null; then
            HTTP_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" --max-time 10 "${HEALTH_ENDPOINT}" 2>/dev/null || echo "000")
            if [ "${HTTP_STATUS}" = "200" ]; then
              echo "PASS: Application is healthy (HTTP ${HTTP_STATUS})"
              exit 0
            else
              echo "WARN: Health endpoint returned HTTP ${HTTP_STATUS}"
              exit 1
            fi
          else
            echo "WARN: curl not available, skipping HTTP health check"
          fi
          HEALTH_SCRIPT
          chmod 755 staging/deploy/healthcheck.sh
          echo "Deployment scripts prepared"
          ls -la staging/deploy/

      - name: Generate build manifest
        run: |
          cat > staging/MANIFEST.json << EOF
          {
            "name": "myapp",
            "version": "${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}",
            "commit": "${{ github.sha }}",
            "ref": "${GITHUB_REF_NAME}",
            "buildNumber": "${GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER}",
            "buildId": "${GITHUB_RUN_ID}",
            "configuration": "${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }}",
            "platform": "${{ env.TARGET_PLATFORM }}",
            "timestamp": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)",
            "artifacts": {
              "binaries": "bin/",
              "config": "config/",
              "deploy": "deploy/"
            }
          }
          EOF

      - name: Generate checksums
        run: |
          cd staging
          find . -type f ! -name 'SHA256SUMS' -exec sha256sum {} \; | sort > SHA256SUMS
          echo "Checksums generated:"
          cat SHA256SUMS

      - name: Upload compiled binaries
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: binaries-${{ env.TARGET_PLATFORM }}-${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
          path: staging/bin/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: error
          compression-level: 9

      - name: Upload configuration files
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: config-${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
          path: staging/config/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: error

      - name: Upload deployment scripts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deploy-scripts-${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
          path: staging/deploy/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: error

      - name: Upload build manifest and checksums
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-metadata-${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
          path: |
            staging/MANIFEST.json
            staging/SHA256SUMS
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: error

      - name: Upload complete distribution package
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: full-distribution-${{ env.TARGET_PLATFORM }}-${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
          path: staging/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS }}
          if-no-files-found: error
          compression-level: 9

  verify:
    name: Verify Artifacts
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10
    steps:
      - name: Download complete distribution
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: full-distribution-${{ env.TARGET_PLATFORM }}-${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}
          path: verify-staging/

      - name: Verify checksums
        run: |
          cd verify-staging
          if [ -f SHA256SUMS ]; then
            echo "Verifying file checksums..."
            sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS
            echo "All checksums verified successfully."
          else
            echo "ERROR: SHA256SUMS file not found"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Verify artifact structure
        run: |
          echo "=== Artifact Structure ==="
          find verify-staging -type f | sort
          echo ""
          echo "=== Verification Checks ==="
          ERRORS=0
          if [ ! -d "verify-staging/bin" ]; then
            echo "FAIL: bin/ directory missing"
            ERRORS=$((ERRORS + 1))
          else
            echo "PASS: bin/ directory exists"
          fi
          if [ ! -d "verify-staging/config" ]; then
            echo "FAIL: config/ directory missing"
            ERRORS=$((ERRORS + 1))
          else
            echo "PASS: config/ directory exists"
          fi
          if [ ! -d "verify-staging/deploy" ]; then
            echo "FAIL: deploy/ directory missing"
            ERRORS=$((ERRORS + 1))
          else
            echo "PASS: deploy/ directory exists"
          fi
          if [ ! -f "verify-staging/MANIFEST.json" ]; then
            echo "FAIL: MANIFEST.json missing"
            ERRORS=$((ERRORS + 1))
          else
            echo "PASS: MANIFEST.json exists"
            echo "Manifest contents:"
            cat verify-staging/MANIFEST.json
          fi
          if [ ! -f "verify-staging/config/build-info.json" ]; then
            echo "FAIL: build-info.json missing"
            ERRORS=$((ERRORS + 1))
          else
            echo "PASS: build-info.json exists"
          fi
          if [ ${ERRORS} -gt 0 ]; then
            echo "Verification failed with ${ERRORS} error(s)"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "All verification checks passed."

      - name: Print download instructions
        run: |
          echo "============================================="
          echo "  BUILD ARTIFACTS AVAILABLE FOR DOWNLOAD"
          echo "============================================="
          echo ""
          echo "Build Version: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}"
          echo "Commit SHA:    ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_sha }}"
          echo "Platform:      ${{ env.TARGET_PLATFORM }}"
          echo "Configuration: ${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }}"
          echo ""
          echo "Available artifacts:"
          echo "  1. binaries-${{ env.TARGET_PLATFORM }}-${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}"
          echo "     -> Compiled application binaries"
          echo ""
          echo "  2. config-${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}"
          echo "     -> Configuration file templates"
          echo ""
          echo "  3. deploy-scripts-${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}"
          echo "     -> Deployment and installation scripts"
          echo ""
          echo "  4. build-metadata-${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}"
          echo "     -> Build manifest and checksums"
          echo ""
          echo "  5. full-distribution-${{ env.TARGET_PLATFORM }}-${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}"
          echo "     -> Complete distribution package (all of the above)"
          echo ""
          echo "Download from: ${GITHUB_SERVER_URL}/${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}/actions/runs/${GITHUB_RUN_ID}"
          echo ""
          echo "After downloading, verify integrity with:"
          echo "  cd <extracted-directory> && sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS"
          echo "============================================="
